review: These Air Max 270s are an absolute dream to walk in. The cushioning is incredible and they look stunning.
Received the wrong size twice. Nike's customer service was unhelpful and slow to respond.
Decent pair of trainers. Nothing exceptional but they do the job for casual wear.
The Nike React Infinity Run transformed my marathon training. Best running shoe I've ever owned!
Glue on the sole started peeling after three weeks. Very poor quality for this price point.
They're fine. Comfortable enough but the colour faded quickly after a few washes.
Absolutely obsessed with these Jordans. The colourway is fire and comfort is on another level.
Sizing is completely off. I ordered a medium and it fits like an extra small. Very frustrating.
Just okay. I expected more from Nike at this price. They feel a bit cheap.
The Metcon 9s are phenomenal for CrossFit. Stable, durable, and look great in the gym.
Shipment took nearly 3 weeks and the box arrived crushed. Nike needs to improve its logistics.
These running shoes have given me serious shin splints. Not recommended for long-distance runs.
Stylish design and very comfortable for all-day wear. Getting so many compliments!
The fabric quality on this hoodie is exceptional. Soft, warm, and holds its shape perfectly.
I've bought Nike for years but this pair is a real letdown. The arch support is non-existent.
Pretty good overall. Would have given five stars but the tongue keeps sliding to one side.
These cleats are unreal! My speed and traction on the pitch improved immediately.
The stitching came undone after a single gym session. Completely unacceptable quality.
Love the minimalist design. They pair with everything and feel surprisingly supportive.
Average shoe. Does what it says on the tin but nothing special about it.
Nike By You customisation experience was incredible. My personalised pair is perfect.
The Dri-FIT technology really works. Stayed dry during my entire 10k run in the heat.
Terrible experience. My order was cancelled without any explanation or notification.
These shoes look great but the sole is incredibly slippery on wet surfaces. Almost fell twice.
The Alphafly 3 gave me a new personal best. The carbon plate makes a noticeable difference.
Packaging was damaged and the shoes had a scuff on the toe box. Disappointing for the price paid.
Not bad at all for the price. Comfortable, lightweight, and they arrived quickly.
The ZoomX foam is absolutely elite. My legs feel so fresh after long runs now.
Nothing to write home about. They fit fine and look okay but I expected better from Nike.
My son loves these for football training. Great grip and the heel collar prevents blisters.
Returned immediately. The smell from the shoes was overwhelming and would not go away.
Good everyday sneaker. Very comfortable from the first wear, no breaking-in needed.
The GT Cut 3s have completely changed my game on the basketball court. Outstanding grip and lockdown.
The colour online looked much more vibrant than what I received. Misleading product photos.
Excellent compression tights. Great for recovery and look very professional.
These feel heavy compared to competitors. Would not choose Nike again for marathon racing.
Solid training shoe. Handles everything from weights to cardio without any issues.
Nike app made ordering seamless. Shoes arrived next day and fit perfectly. Very impressed.
The loop on the heel broke on day one. Clearly a manufacturing defect and not acceptable.
Great shoe but runs about half a size small. Order up if you are between sizes.
I have worn these every day for three months and they still look brand new. Incredible durability.
The tech fleece is fine but the zipper feels cheap and the pocket placement is awkward.
Phenomenal grip on the court. Never felt more confident cutting and stopping quickly.
Very average experience. Product was fine, nothing went wrong, but I am not blown away either.
The Nike Killshot 2 is such a clean timeless silhouette. Gets compliments every single time.
Sizing guide on the website was completely wrong. Had to return and wait two more weeks.
Genuinely the most comfortable football boot I have ever worn. Wish I had found these sooner.
It is an okay shoe. Not great not terrible. Just average in every way.
Blister city. The heel lining is rough and caused serious blisters within the first mile.
Stunning design and the fit is perfect. Nike continues to set the standard for athletic footwear.
